subcodes.first_line: From this station We make mention of him who was named Ghulám-i-Ridá, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of his Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من هذا المقام من سمی بغلام قبل رضا لیفرح بذکر مولاه القدیم انا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
